how about april 3, or 4

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

I think that the week of 4/11 is going to be tough
as passover falls on 4/12
(pm) and good friday is that week as well. I need to
be in dallas monday and
tuesday looks wild back in nyc. Weds night is
command performance too. I am
guessing that puerto rico turns into a pumpkin at
the end of the week given
the high goyim factor and the coming of goog friday
and easter sunday.
Soooo, how's 4/17 or 4/18?
